name: Iso11783OPChangeLineAttribute
title: Iso11783OPChangeLineAttribute
syntax: long Iso11783OPChangeLineAttribute( dword ecuHandle, dword objectID, dword color, dword width, dword art );
description: The function changes the properties of a line attribute object. A Change Line Attribute command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
